title: OpenSignals
description: Open Signals is a Minecraft mod that adds German railroad signals. The signals are compatible with all train mods.
body:
![OpenSignals](https://github.com/Jeronimo97/OpenSignalsWebAssets/blob/main/assets/opensignals.png?raw=true)

![Versions](https://badges.moddingx.org/modrinth/versions/1FAZm7aq)

![Downloads](https://badges.moddingx.org/modrinth/downloads/1FAZm7aq)

### The new version of OpenSignals (3.x) is not compatible with the old versions (2.x).
### Our mod is still work in progress and may contain bugs.  Please make a backup of your world.

![Description](https://github.com/Jeronimo97/OpenSignalsWebAssets/blob/main/assets/description.png?raw=true)

**Open Signals is a Minecraft mod that adds different railroad signals. These signals are compatible with all train mods or can run standalone.**

![Features](https://github.com/Jeronimo97/OpenSignalsWebAssets/blob/main/assets/features.png?raw=true)

### Various German railroad signals are included by default, i.a.:
* Main and Distant signals (HV)
* Combination signals (Ks)
* Main light and distant signals (Hl)
* Tram signals
* Traffic Lights
* Various signal plates (Lf, Ne, Ra, ...)
* switch levers
* Barriers and crossbucks

### Other features
* Signals can be controlled in several ways
    * manually with the signal controller (GUI)
    * by redstone
    * signalbox block
* Fully adjustable - With the signal placer item you can assemble the signal to your wishes.
* Signals can be placed in rotation by 22.5°
* also works in non-loaded chunks
* performance-friendly
* you can add our own signals or signals created by other users with our contentpack system


If you have any wishes for the mod, visit our Github Issue page and open a ticket or check out our discord server. We will try to integrate your suggestions into the mod. 

![How to use](https://github.com/Jeronimo97/OpenSignalsWebAssets/blob/main/assets/howtouse.png?raw=true)

You can find more information about this in our [Wiki](https://github.com/MrTroble/Open-Signals/wiki).

![Content Packs](https://github.com/Jeronimo97/OpenSignalsWebAssets/blob/main/assets/contentpacks.png?raw=true)

A list of already created ContentPacks can be found [here](https://github.com/MrTroble/Open-Signals/wiki/Content-Packs).

But you can also create your own contentpacks with signals, signs and other stuff and bring them into the game. How to do that you can read [here](https://github.com/MrTroble/Open-Signals/wiki/content-pack-documentation).

![Screenshots](https://github.com/Jeronimo97/OpenSignalsWebAssets/blob/main/assets/screenshots.png?raw=true)

![Signals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1FAZm7aq/images/593488f76f59b84cde410a8b161ccf7e2991677a.png)

![Videos](https://github.com/Jeronimo97/OpenSignalsWebAssets/blob/main/assets/videos.png?raw=true)

Coming soon(tm)
